args.code: (() => { try { const save = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1') || '{}'); const skills = save.skills || {}; const npcs = save.npcMilestones || {}; const stats = save.stats || {}; return JSON.stringify({ day: save.day, season: save.season, time: save.time, money: save.money, stamina: save.stamina, maxStamina: save.maxStamina, health: save.health, maxHealth: save.maxHealth, fieldsCount: (save.fields || []).length, fields: (save.fields || []).map(f => ({stage:f.stage, crop:f.crop, progress:f.growProgress, prepared:f.prepared})), eventsToday: save.eventsToday, eventHistoryCount: (save.eventHistory || []).length, totalEvents: (save.randomEvents || []).length, dailyActions: save.dailyActions, npcs: npcs, skills: skills, items: save.items, seeds: save.seeds, crops: save.crops, buildings: save.buildings, house: save.house, storageCapacity: save.storageCapacity, processed: save.processedItems, reputation: save.reputation, mood: save.mood, researchPoints: save.researchPoints, weather: save.weather, mode: save.mode, disasterRate: save.disasterRate, stats: stats, pets: save.pets, quests: save.quests, milestones: save.milestones, speed: localStorage.getItem('farm_game_speed'), autoPlay: save.autoPlayEnabled, lastSave: save.lastSaveTimestamp, daysPlayed: stats.daysPlayed, totalHarvest: stats.totalHarvest, totalSell: stats.totalSell }); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({error: e.message}); } })()
